27. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\t// If the before renderer is nil, treat it the same as a Create action.\n\tif renderer.before.Renderer == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/unknown.go"
}
Output
{
  "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\t// If the before renderer is nil, treat it the same as a Create action.\n\tif renderer.before.Renderer == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/unknown.go",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
28. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/block.go"
}
Output
{
  "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",

  "type": "create"
}

  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: // Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\\n2: // SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\\n3: \\n4: package renderers\\n5: \\n6: import (\\n7: \\t\\\"encoding/json\\\"\\n8: \\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n9: \\t\\\"testing\\\"\\n10: \\n11: \\t\\\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\\\"\\n12: \\n13: \\t\\\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\\\"\\n14: \\t\\\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\\\"\\n15: \\t\\\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\\\"\\n16: \\n17: \\t\\\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\\\"\\n18: )\\n19: \\n20: func TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\\n21: \\tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\\n22: \\t\\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\\n23: \\t\\tDisable: true,\\n24: \\t}\\n25: \\n26: \\ttcs := tests to demonstrate the\\n32: \\t\\t// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null\\n33: \\t\\t// value.\\n34: \\t\\t\\\"primitive_create_string\\\": {\\n35: \\t\\t\\tdiff: computed.Diff{\\n36: \\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \\\"null\\\", cty.String),\\n37: \\t\\t\\t\\tAction:   plans.Create,\\n38: \\t\\t\\t},\\n39: \\t\\t\\texpected: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef@03972dc6baec33aef946cdbc8052ed82f2dc48eb/-/blob/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go%3FL1-50\"}",

    "content": "1: // Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n2: // SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n3: \n4: package renderers\n5: \n6: import (\n7: \t\"encoding/json\"\n8: \t\"strings\"\n9: \t\"testing\"\n10: \n11: \t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n12: \n13: \t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n14: \t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n15: \t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n16: \n17: \t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n18: )\n19: \n20: func TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\n21: \tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\n22: \t\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\n23: \t\tDisable: true,\n24: \t}\n25: \n26: \ttcs := map[string]struct {\n27: \t\tdiff     computed.Diff\n28: \t\texpected string\n29: \t\topts     computed.RenderHumanOpts\n30: \t}{\n31: \t\t// We're using the string \"null\" in these tests to demonstrate the\n32: \t\t// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null\n33: \t\t// value.\n34: \t\t\"primitive_create_string\": {\n35: \t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n36: \t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n37: \t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n38: \t\t\t},\n39: \t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\"\",\n40: \t\t},\n41: \t\t\"primitive_delete_string\": {\n42: \t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n43: \t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n44: \t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n45: \t\t\t},\n46: \t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n47: \t\t},\n48: \t\t\"primitive_update_string_to_null\": {\n49: \t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n50: \t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n51: ",

46. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\t// If the before renderer is nil, treat it the same as a Create action.\n\tif renderer.before.Renderer == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go",
    "numLines": 48,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 48
  },
  "type": "text"
}
47. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)\n\n\timportantAttributes = []string{\n\t\t\"id\",\n\t\t\"name\",\n\t\t\"tags\",\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc importantAttribute(attr string) bool {\n\tfor _, attribute := range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys []string\n\tescapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)\n\tfor key := range renderer.attributes {\n\t\tattributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)\n\t\tescapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := renderer.attributes[key]\n\t\tif importantAttribute(key) {\n\n\t\t\t// Always display the important attributes.\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, importantAttributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, key, attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, importantAttributeOpts)))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif attribute.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\tunchangedAttributes++\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, warning := range attribute.WarningsHuman(indent+1, opts) {\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%-*s = %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(attribute.Action, attributeOpts), maximumAttributeKeyLen, escapedAttributeKeys[key], attribute.RenderHuman(indent+1, attributeOpts)))\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedAttributes > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"attribute\", unchangedAttributes, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tblockKeys := renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()\n\tfor _, key := range blockKeys {\n\n\t\tfoundChangedBlock := false\n\t\trenderBlock := func(diff computed.Diff, mapKey string, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) {\n\n\t\t\tcreatingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Create && renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tdeletingSensitiveValue := diff.Action == plans.Delete && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key]\n\t\t\tmodifyingSensitiveValue := (diff.Action == plans.Update || diff.Action == plans.NoOp) && (renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] || renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key])\n\n\t\t\tif creatingSensitiveValue || deletingSensitiveValue || modifyingSensitiveValue {\n\t\t\t\t// Intercept the renderer here if the sensitive data was set\n\t\t\t\t// across all the blocks instead of individually.\n\t\t\t\taction := diff.Action\n\t\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key] != renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\t\taction = plans.Update\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tdiff = computed.NewDiff(SensitiveBlock(diff, renderer.blocks.BeforeSensitiveBlocks[key], renderer.blocks.AfterSensitiveBlocks[key]), action, diff.Replace)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff.Action == plans.NoOp && !opts.ShowUnchangedChildren {\n\t\t\t\tunchangedBlocks++\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !foundChangedBlock && len(renderer.attributes) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t// We always want to put an extra new line between the\n\t\t\t\t// attributes and blocks, and between groups of blocks.\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(\"\\n\")\n\t\t\t\tfoundChangedBlock = true\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// If the force replacement metadata was set for every entry in the\n\t\t\t// block we need to override that here. Our child blocks will only\n\t\t\t// know about the replace function if it was set on them\n\t\t\t// specifically, and not if it was set for all the blocks.\n\t\t\tblockOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tblockOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = renderer.blocks.ReplaceBlocks[key]\n\n\t\t\tfor _, warning := range diff.WarningsHuman(indent+1, blockOpts) {\n\t\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), warning))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s%s%s %s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(diff.Action, blockOpts), EnsureValidAttributeName(key), mapKey, diff.RenderHuman(indent+1, blockOpts)))\n\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSingleBlock(key):\n\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.SingleBlocks[key], \"\", opts)\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsMapBlock(key):\n\t\t\tvar keys []string\n\t\t\tfor key := range renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, key)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(keys)\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, innerKey := range keys {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(renderer.blocks.MapBlocks[key][innerKey], fmt.Sprintf(\" %q\", innerKey), opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsSetBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tsetOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t\t\tsetOpts.ForceForcesReplacement = diff.Replace\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.SetBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase renderer.blocks.IsListBlock(key):\n\n\t\t\tif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), diff.Action, false), \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, block := range renderer.blocks.ListBlocks[key] {\n\t\t\t\trenderBlock(block, \"\", opts)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif unchangedBlocks > 0 {\n\t\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"\\n%s%s%s\\n\", formatIndent(indent+1), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts), unchanged(\"block\", unchangedBlocks, opts)))\n\t}\n\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s%s}\", formatIndent(indent), writeDiffActionSymbol(plans.NoOp, opts)))\n\treturn buf.String()\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/block.go",
    "numLines": 198,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 198
  },
  "type": "text"
}

\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}, Blocks{}),\\n2156: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAction: plans.NoOp,\\n2157: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n2158: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n2159: \\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n2160: \\t\\t\\t\\tAction: plans.NoOp,\\n2161: \\t\\t\\t},\\n2162: \\t\\t\\texpected: `\\n2163: {\\n2164:         id      = \\\"root\\\"\\n2165:         # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\\n2166: \\n2167:         # (2 unchanged blocks hidden)\\n2168:     }`,\\n2169: \\t\\t},\\n2170: \\t\\t\\\"output_map_to_list\\\": {\\n2171: \\t\\t\\tdiff: computed.Diff{\\n2172: \\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: TypeChange(computed.Diff{\\n2173: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: Map(map[string]computed.Diff{\\n2174: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"element_one\\\": {\\n2175: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\\\"0\\\"), nil, cty.Number),\\n2176: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAction:   plans.Delete,\\n2177: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n2178: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"element_two\\\": {\\n2179: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\\\"1\\\"), nil, cty.Number),\\n2180: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAction:   plans.Delete,\\n2181: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n2182: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n2183: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAction: plans.Delete,\\n2184: \\t\\t\\t\\t}, computed.Diff{\\n2185: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: List([]computed.Diff{\\n2186: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\n2187: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\\\"0\\\"), cty.Number),\\n2188: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAction:   plans.Create,\\n2189: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n2190: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\n2191: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\\\"1\\\"), cty.Number),\\n2192: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAction:   plans.Create,\\n2193: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n2194: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n2195: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAction: plans.Create,\\n2196: \\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n2197: \\t\\t\\t},\\n2198: \\t\\t\\texpected: `\\n2199: {\\n2200:       - \\\"element_one\\\" = 0\\n2201:       - \\\"element_two\\\" = 1\\n2202:     } -> [\\n2203:       + 0,\\n2204:       + 1,\\n2205:     ]\\n2206: `,\\n2207: \\t\\t},\\n2208: \\t\\t\\\"json_string_no_symbols\\\": {\\n2209: \\t\\t\\tdiff: computed.Diff{\\n2210: \\t\\t\\t\\tRenderer: Primitive(\\\"{\\\\\\\"key\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value\\\\\\\"}\\\", \\\"{\\\\\\\"key\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value\\\\\\\"}\\\", cty.String),\\n2211: \\t\\t\\t\\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\\n2212: \\t\\t\\t},\\n2213: \\t\\t\\topts: computed.RenderHumanOpts{\\n2214: \\t\\t\\t\\tHideDiffActionSymbols: true,\\n2215: \\t\\t\\t\\tShowUnchangedChildren: true,\\n2216: \\t\\t\\t},\\n2217: \\t\\t\\texpected: `\\n2218: jsonencode(\\n2219:     {\\n2220:         key = \\\"value\\\"\\n2221:     }\\n2222: )\\n2223: `,\\n2224: \\t\\t},\\n2225: \\t}\\n2226: \\tfor name, tc := range tcs {\\n2227: \\t\\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\\n2228: \\n2229: \\t\\t\\topts := tc.opts.Clone()\\n2230: \\t\\t\\topts.Colorize = &colorize\\n2231: \\n2232: \\t\\t\\texpected := strings.TrimSpace(tc.expected)\\n2233: \\t\\t\\tactual := tc.diff.RenderHuman(0, opts)\\n2234: \\t\\t\\tif diff := cmp.Diff(expected, actual); len(diff) > 0 {\\n2235: \\t\\t\\t\\tt.Fatalf(\\\"\\\\nexpected:\\\\n%s\\\\nactual:\\\\n%s\\\\ndiff:\\\\n%s\\\\n\\\", expected, actual, diff)\\n2236: \\t\\t\\t}\\n2237: \\t\\t})\\n2238: \\t}\\n2239: }\\n2240: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef@03972dc6baec33aef946cdbc8052ed82f2dc48eb/-/blob/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/renderer_test.go%3FL2000-2500\"}"
57. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nfunc TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\n\t\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\n\t\tDisable: true,\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tdiff     computed.Diff\n\t\texpected string\n\t\topts     computed.RenderHumanOpts\n\t}{\n\t\t// We're using the string \"null\" in these tests to demonstrate the\n\t\t// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null\n\t\t// value.\n\t\t\"primitive_create_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null -> \\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"nu\\nll\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - nu\n      - ll\n      + null\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"nu\\nll\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - null\n      + nu\n      + ll\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_json_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"[null]\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        [\n          - null,\n        ]\n    ) -> null\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_json_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"[null]\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\nnull -> jsonencode(\n        [\n          + null,\n        ]\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_fake_json\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"[\\\"hello\\\"] and some more\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\"[\\\"hello\\\"] and some more\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_null_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_null_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1 -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_override\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\topts:     computed.RenderHumanOpts{OverrideNullSuffix: true},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1 -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null -> 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"0 -> 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_long_float\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"123456789\"), json.Number(\"987654321\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"123456789 -> 987654321\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_long_float_with_decimals\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1.23456789\"), json.Number(\"9.87654321\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1.23456789 -> 9.87654321\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_very_long_float\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"9223372036854773256\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"9223372036854773256\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_replace\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\tReplace:  true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"0 -> 1 # forces replacement\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_string_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"hello\\nworld\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_string_delete\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello\\nworld\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT -> null\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello\\nold\\nworld\", \"hello\\nnew\\nworld\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n      - old\n      + new\n        world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_string_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          + key_one = \"value_one\"\n          + key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_string_delete\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          - key_one = \"value_one\"\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    ) -> null\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\",\\\"key_three\\\":\\\"value_three\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n      ~ {\n          + key_three = \"value_three\"\n            # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_explicit_nulls\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\":\\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\":null}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n      ~ {\n          ~ key_one = \"value_one\" -> null\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_fake_json_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t// This isn't valid JSON, our renderer should be okay with it.\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\",\\\"key_three\\\":\\\"value_three\\\"\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"{\\\\\\\"key_one\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"value_one\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"key_two\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value_two\\\\\\\"\\\" -> \\\"{\\\\\\\"key_one\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"value_one\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"key_two\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value_two\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"key_three\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"value_three\\\\\\\"}\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multiline_to_json_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello\\nworld\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT -> jsonencode(\n        {\n          + key_one = \"value_one\"\n          + key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_to_multiline_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"hello\\nworld\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          - key_one = \"value_one\"\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    ) -> <<-EOT\n        hello\n        world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_to_string_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", \"hello world\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        {\n          - key_one = \"value_one\"\n          - key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    ) -> \"hello world\"\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_string_to_json_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello world\", \"{\\\"key_one\\\": \\\"value_one\\\",\\\"key_two\\\":\\\"value_two\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n\"hello world\" -> jsonencode(\n        {\n          + key_one = \"value_one\"\n          + key_two = \"value_two\"\n        }\n    )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_multi_to_single_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello\\nworld\", \"hello world\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - hello\n      - world\n      + hello world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_single_to_multi_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"hello world\", \"hello\\nworld\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - hello world\n      + hello\n      + world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"sensitive_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Sensitive(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t}, true, true),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"(sensitive value)\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"sensitive_update_replace\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Sensitive(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\tReplace:  true,\n\t\t\t\t}, true, true),\n\t\t\t\tAction:  plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\tReplace: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"(sensitive value) # forces replacement\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"computed_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Unknown(computed.Diff{}),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"(known after apply)\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"computed_update\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Unknown(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"0 -> (known after apply)\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"computed_create_forces_replacement\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Unknown(computed.Diff{}),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\tReplace:  true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"(known after apply) # forces replacement\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"computed_update_forces_replacement\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Unknown(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tAction:  plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\tReplace: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"0 -> (known after apply) # forces cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{\n\t\t\t\t\tSingleBlocks: map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block:one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"one\", \"four\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"two\", \"three\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      ~ \"attribute:two\" = 2 -> 3\n      ~ attribute_one   = 1 -> 2\n      ~ attribute_six   = 3 -> 4\n\n      ~ \"nested_block:one\" {\n          ~ string = \"one\" -> \"four\"\n        }\n\n      ~ nested_block_two {\n          ~ string = \"two\" -> \"three\"\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"block_always_includes_important_attributes\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"root\", \"root\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"boolean\": map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"one\", \"one\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}, Blocks{}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Block(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"two\", \"two\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: `\n{\n        id      = \"root\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n        # (2 unchanged blocks hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"output_map_to_list\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: TypeChange(computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Map(map[string]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"element_one\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"element_two\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t\t}, computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: List([]computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"0\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n{\n      - \"element_one\" = 0\n      - \"element_two\" = 1\n    } -> [\n      + 0,\n      + 1,\n    ]\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"json_string_no_symbols\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"{\\\"key\\\":\\\"value\\\"}\", \"{\\\"key\\\":\\\"value\\\"}\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\topts: computed.RenderHumanOpts{\n\t\t\t\tHideDiffActionSymbols: true,\n\t\t\t\tShowUnchangedChildren: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n    {\n        key = \"value\"\n    }\n)\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor name, tc := range tcs {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\n\t\t\topts := tc.opts.Clone()\n\t\t\topts.Colorize = &colorize\n\n\t\t\texpected := strings.TrimSpace(tc.expected)\n\t\t\tactual := tc.diff.RenderHuman(0, opts)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(expected, actual); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", expected, actual, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

}

  "originalFile": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nfunc TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolorize := colorstring.Colorize{\n\t\tColors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,\n\t\tDisable: true,\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tdiff     computed.Diff\n\t\texpected string\n\t\topts     computed.RenderHumanOpts\n\t}{\n\t\t// We're using the string \"null\" in these tests to demonstrate the\n\t\t// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null\n\t\t// value.\n\t\t\"primitive_create_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"null\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"\\\"null\\\" -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"null\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null -> \\\"null\\\"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"nu\\nll\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - nu\n      - ll\n      + null\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_multiline_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"nu\\nll\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\n<<-EOT\n      - null\n      + nu\n      + ll\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_json_string_to_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(\"[null]\", nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\njsonencode(\n        [\n          - null,\n        ]\n    ) -> null\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_json_string_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff:   )\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_fake_json\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"[\\\"hello\\\"] and some more\", cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: `\"[\\\"hello\\\"] and some more\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create_null_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete_null_string\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, nil, cty.String),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Create,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_delete\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1\"), nil, cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Delete,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\topts:     computed.RenderHumanOpts{OverrideNullSuffix: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"1 -> null\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_from_null\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, json.Number(\"1\"), Primitive(json.Number(\"0\"), json.Number(\"1\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"0 -> 1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_long_float\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"123456789\"), json.Number(\"987654321\"), cty.Number),\n\t\t\t\tAction:   plans.Update,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpected: \"123456789 -> 987654321\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_update_long_float_with_decimals\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(json.Number(\"1.23456789\"), json.Number(\"9.87654321\"), old\n      + new\n        world\n    EOT\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"primitive_json_string_create\": {\n\t\t\tdiff: computed.Diff{\n\t\t\t\tRenderer: Primitive(nil, \"{\\\"key_one\\\":   "prompt": "Read the file internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go from Sourcegraph repository github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef. Find all occurrences where the expected output shows \"+ (known after apply)\" for unknown blocks in update contexts. Save the file locally at /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go. Then report: 1) how many such locations you found, 2) the test names, and 3) the approximate line numbers where changes from + to ~ need to be made.",
  "subagent_type": "general-purpose"
}

Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\\n40: \\n41: Terraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\\n42: and found no differences, so no changes are needed.\\n43: `\\n44: \\n45: \\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\\n46: \\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\\n47: \\t\\tt.Errorf(\\\"unexpected output\\\\ngot:\\\\n%s\\\\nwant:\\\\n%s\\\\ndiff:\\\\n%s\\\", got, want, diff)\\n48: \\t}\\n49: }\\n50: \\n51: func TestRenderHuman_DeferredPlan(t *testing.T) {\\n52: \\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\\n53: \\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\\n54: \\n55: \\tplan := Plan{\\n56: \\t\\tDeferredChanges: []jsonplan.DeferredResourceChange{\\n57: \\t\\t\\t{\\n58: \\t\\t\\t\\tReason: jsonplan.DeferredReasonDeferredPrereq,\\n59: \\t\\t\\t\\tResourceChange: jsonplan.ResourceChange{\\n60: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAddress:      \\\"aws_instance.foo\\\",\\n61: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tMode: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"id\\\":    \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n70: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"value\\\": \\\"Hello, World!\\\",\\n71: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n72: Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\\n333:   ~ update in-place\\n334: \\n335: Terraform will perform the following actions:\\n336: \\n337:   # test_resource.after will be updated in-place\\n338:   # (moved from test_resource.before)\\n339:   # (imported from \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\")\\n340:   ~ resource \\\"test_resource\\\" \\\"after\\\" {\\n341:         id    = \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\"\\n342:       ~ value = \\\"Hello, World!\\\" -> \\\"Hello, Universe!\\\"\\n343:     }\\n344: \\n345: Plan: 1 to import, 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.\\n346: `,\\n347: \\t\\t},\\n348: \\t\\t\\\"import_and_update\\\": {\\n349: \\t\\t\\tplan: Plan{\\n350: \\t\\t\\t\\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\\n351: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\n352: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAddress:      \\\"test_resource.resource\\\",\\n353: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tMode:         \\\"managed\\\",\\n354: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:         \\\"test_resource\\\",\\n355: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tName:         \\\"resource\\\",\\n356: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tProviderName: \\\"test\\\",\\n357: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\\n358: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tActions: []string{\\\"update\\\"},\\n359: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\\n360: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"id\\\":    \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n361: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"value\\\": \\\"Hello, World!\\\",\\n362: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n363: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\\n364: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"id\\\":    \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n365: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"value\\\": \\\"Hello, Universe!\\\",\\n366: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n367: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{\\n368: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tID: \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n369: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n370: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n371: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n372: \\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n373: \\t\\t\\t},\\n374: \\t\\t\\toutput: `\\n375: Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution\\n376: plan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\\n377:   ~ update in-place\\n378: \\n379: Terraform will perform the following actions:\\n380: \\n381:   # test_resource.resource will be updated in-place\\n382:   # (imported from \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\")\\n383:   ~ resource \\\"test_resource\\\" \\\"resource\\\" {\\n384:         id    = \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\"\\n385:       ~ value = \\\"Hello, World!\\\" -> \\\"Hello, Universe!\\\"\\n386:     }\\n387: \\n388: Plan: 1 to import, 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.\\n389: `,\\n390: \\t\\t},\\n391: \\t\\t\\\"import_and_update_with_no_id\\\": {\\n392: \\t\\t\\tplan: Plan{\\n393: \\t\\t\\t\\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\\n394: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\n395: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAddress:      \\\"test_resource.resource\\\",\\n396: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tMode:         \\\"managed\\\",\\n397: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:         \\\"test_resource\\\",\\n398: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tName:         \\\"resource\\\",\\n399: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tProviderName: \\\"test\\\",\\n400: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\\n401: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tActions: []string{\\\"update\\\"},\\n402: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\\n403: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"id\\\":    \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n404: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"value\\\": \\\"Hello, World!\\\",\\n405: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n406: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\\n407: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"id\\\":    \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n408: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"value\\\": \\\"Hello, Universe!\\\",\\n409: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n410: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{},\\n411: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n412: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n413: \\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n414: \\t\\t\\t},\\n415: \\t\\t\\toutput: `\\n416: Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution\\n417: plan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\\n418:   ~ update in-place\\n419: \\n420: Terraform will perform the following actions:\\n421: \\n422:   # test_resource.resource will be updated in-place\\n423:   # (will be imported first)\\n424:   ~ resource \\\"test_resource\\\" \\\"resource\\\" {\\n425:         id    = \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\"\\n426:       ~ value = \\\"Hello, World!\\\" -> \\\"Hello, Universe!\\\"\\n427:     }\\n428: \\n429: Plan: 1 to import, 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.\\n430: `,\\n431: \\t\\t},\\n432: \\t\\t\\\"import_and_replace\\\": {\\n433: \\t\\t\\tplan: Plan{\\n434: \\t\\t\\t\\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\\n435: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t{\\n436: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAddress:      \\\"test_resource.resource\\\",\\n437: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tMode:         \\\"managed\\\",\\n438: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:         \\\"test_resource\\\",\\n439: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tName:         \\\"resource\\\",\\n440: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tProviderName: \\\"test\\\",\\n441: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\\n442: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tActions: []string{\\\"create\\\", \\\"delete\\\"},\\n443: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\\n444: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"id\\\":    \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n445: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"value\\\": \\\"Hello, World!\\\",\\n446: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n447: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\\n448: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"id\\\":    \\\"9794FB1F-7260-442F-830C-F2D450E90CE3\\\",\\n449: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"value\\\": \\\"Hello, World!\\\",\\n450: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\\n451: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tReplacePaths: marshalJson(t, [][]string{{\\\"id\\\"}}),\\n452: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{\\n453: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tID: \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\",\\n454: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n455: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n456: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tActionReason: \\\"\\\",\\n457: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n458: \\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n459: \\t\\t\\t},\\n460: \\t\\t\\toutput: `\\n461: Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution\\n462: plan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\\n463: +/- create replacement and then destroy\\n464: \\n465: Terraform will perform the following actions:\\n466: \\n467:   # test_resource.resource must be replaced\\n468:   # (imported from \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\")\\n469:   # Warning: this will destroy the imported resource\\n470: +/- resource \\\"test_resource\\\" \\\"resource\\\" {\\n471:       ~ id    = \\\"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\\\" -> \\\"9794FB1F-7260-442F-830C-F2D450E90CE3\\\" # forces replacement\\n472:         value = \\\"Hello, World!\\\"\\n473:     }\\n474: \\n475: Plan: 1 to import, 1 to add, 0 to change, 1 to destroy.\\n476: `,\\n477: \\t\\t},\\n478: \\t}\\n479: \\tfor name, tc := range tcs {\\n480: \\t\\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\\n481: \\t\\t\\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\\n482: \\n483: \\t\\t\\tplan := tc.plan\\n484: \\t\\t\\tplan.PlanFormatVersion = jsonplan.FormatVersion\\n485: \\t\\t\\tplan.ProviderFormatVersion = jsonprovider.FormatVersion\\n486: \\t\\t\\tplan.ProviderSchemas = schemas\\n487: \\n488: \\t\\t\\trenderer := Renderer{\\n489: \\t\\t\\t\\tColorize: color,\\n490: \\t\\t\\t\\tStreams:  streams,\\n491: \\t\\t\\t}\\n492: \\t\\t\\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\\n493: \\n494: \\t\\t\\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\\n495: \\t\\t\\twant := tc.output\\n496: \\t\\t\\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\\n497: \\t\\t\\t\\tt.Errorf(\\\"unexpected output\\\\ngot:\\\\n%s\\\\nwant:\\\\n%s\\\\ndiff:\\\\n%s\\\", got, want, diff)\\n498: \\t\\t\\t}\\n499: \\t\\t})\\n500: \\t}\\n501: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef@03972dc6baec33aef946cdbc8052ed82f2dc48eb/-/blob/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go%3FL1-500\"}"

Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\\n40: \\n41: Terraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\\n42: and found no differences, so no changes are needed.\\n43: `\\n44: \\n45: \\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\\n46: \\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\\n47: \\t\\tt.Errorf(\\\"unexpected output\\\\ngot:\\\\n%s\\\\nwant:\\\\n%s\\\\ndiff:\\\\n%s\\\", got, want, diff)\\n48: \\t}\\n49: }\\n50: \\n51: func TestRenderHuman_DeferredPlan(t *testing.T) {\\n52: \\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\\n53: 91. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "# Test Case Analysis: Unknown Blocks with Update Actions in plan_test.go\n\n## Repository\ngithub.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef\nFile: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\n\n## Summary\nFound **3 test cases** with Update/Create actions that have unknown blocks showing \"+ (known after apply)\" output. These need to be changed from `+` to `~` to indicate they are modified/updated blocks rather than new blocks being created.\n\n---\n\n## Test Cases Found\n\n### 1. Test: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (TestResourceChange_nestedList)\n- **Function**: `TestResourceChange_nestedList(t *testing.T)`\n- **Line Range**: Lines 3506-3560 (test case definition) with expected output on line 3551\n- **Action Type**: `plans.Update`\n- **Block Type**: NestingList (cty.UnknownVal with List)\n- **Current Expected Output (Line 3551)**:\n  ```\n  + root_block_device (known after apply)\n  ```\n- **Should Be Changed To**:\n  ```\n  ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n  ```\n- **Context**: Test has before/after values where `root_block_device` goes from known (SetVal) to unknown (UnknownVal). This is an update context where the block is being modified, not created.\n\n---\n\n### 2. Test: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (TestResourceChange_nestedSet)\n- **Function**: `TestResourceChange_nestedSet(t *testing.T)`\n- **Line Range**: Lines 4233-4287 (test case definition) with expected output on line 4278\n- **Action Type**: `plans.Update`\n- **Block Type**: NestingSet (cty.UnknownVal with Set)\n- **Current Expected Output (Line 4278)**:\n  ```\n  + root_block_device (known after apply)\n  ```\n- **Should Be Changed To**:\n  ```\n  ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n  ```\n- **Context**: Similar to the List case - before has root_block_device with values, after becomes UnknownVal. This is an update operation.\n\n---\n\n### 3. Test: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (TestResourceChange_nestedMap)\n- **Function**: `TestResourceChange_nestedMap(t *testing.T)`\n- **Line Range**: Lines 4763-4817 (test case definition) with expected output on line 4808\n- **Action Type**: `plans.Update`\n- **Block Type**: NestingMap (cty.UnknownVal with Map)\n- **Current Expected Output (Line 4808)**:\n  ```\n  + root_block_device (known after apply)\n  ```\n- **Should Be Changed To**:\n  ```\n  ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n  ```\n- **Context**: Consistent pattern - before has mapped blocks, after becomes UnknownVal. Update action should show `~` not `+`.\n\n---\n\n## Additional Context\n\nThere are also related test cases showing the CREATE action patterns:\n\n### Create Action Cases (No changes needed - these correctly use `+`)\n- Line 3503: \"in-place create - unknown block\" (TestResourceChange_nestedList) - uses `+` correctly\n- Line 4230: \"in-place create - unknown block\" (TestResourceChange_nestedSet) - uses `+` correctly\n- Line 4760: \"in-place create - unknown block\" (TestResourceChange_nestedMap) - uses `+` correctly\n\nThese CREATE action cases correctly show `+` because they are creating new resources/blocks.\n\n---\n\n## Summary of Changes Required\n\n| Test Name | Function | Line # | Current | New |\n|-----------|----------|--------|---------|-----|\n| in-place update - unknown block | TestResourceChange_nestedList | 3551 | `+ root_block_device` | `~ root_block_device` |\n| in-place update - unknown block | TestResourceChange_nestedSet | 4278 | `+ root_block_device` | `~ root_block_device` |\n| in-place update - unknown block | TestResourceChange_nestedMap | 4808 | `+ root_block_device` | `~ root_block_device` |\n\n## Technical Details\n\nThese test cases represent a scenario where:\n1. A resource already exists with some blocks defined\n2. During an update operation, those blocks become unknown (due to dynamic values, dependencies, etc.)\n3. The output should use `~` (modified) not `+` (created) because this is an in-place update that affects existing blocks\n\nThe pattern is consistent across all three nesting types (List, Set, Map) and needs to be corrected to properly represent that these are updates to existing blocks within an update operation, not new blocks being created.\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/FINDINGS.md"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/FINDINGS.md"

cty.String,\\n3541: \\t\\t\\t\\t}))),\\n3542: \\t\\t\\t}),\\n3543: \\t\\t\\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\\n3544: \\t\\t\\tSchema:          testSchemaPlus(configschema.NestingList),\\n3545: \\t\\t\\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\\n3546:   ~ resource \\\"test_instance\\\" \\\"example\\\" {\\n3547:       ~ ami   = \\\"ami-BEFORE\\\" -> \\\"ami-AFTER\\\"\\n3548:         id    = \\\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\\\"\\n3549:         # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\\n3550: \\n3551:       + root_block_device (known after apply)\\n3552:       - {
  "content": "// Extract from github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\n// Showing the three test cases that need updates\n\n// TEST 1: TestResourceChange_nestedList - Line 3506-3561\n// Function starts at line 2980\n// Test case name: \"in-place update - unknown block\"\n// Action: plans.Update\n// Issue location: Line 3551\n// Current: + root_block_device (known after apply)\n// Should be: ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n\n\\t\\t\"in-place update - unknown block\": {\n\\t\\t\\tAction: plans.Update,\n\\t\\t\\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\\t\\t\\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"disks\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"mount_point\": cty.StringVal(\"/var/diska\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"size\":        cty.StringVal(\"50GB\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"root_block_device\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"volume_type\": cty.StringVal(\"gp1\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"new_field\":   cty.StringVal(\"new_value\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"volume_type\": cty.StringVal(\"gp2\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"new_field\":   cty.StringVal(\"new_value\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"disks\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"mount_point\": cty.StringVal(\"/var/diska\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"size\":        cty.StringVal(\"50GB\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.List(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"new_field\":   cty.String,\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}))),\n\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\\t\\t\\tSchema:          testSchemaPlus(configschema.NestingList),\n\\t\\t\\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami   = \"ami-BEFORE\" -> \"ami-AFTER\"\n        id    = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)  // LINE 3551 - NEEDS CHANGE TO ~\n      - root_block_device {\n          - new_field   = \"new_value\" -> null\n          - volume_type = \"gp1\" -> null\n        }\n      - root_block_device {\n          - new_field   = \"new_value\" -> null\n          - volume_type = \"gp2\" -> null\n        }\n    }`,\n\\t\\t},\n\n---\n\n// TEST 2: TestResourceChange_nestedSet - Line 4233-4287\n// Function starts at line 3697\n// Test case name: \"in-place update - unknown block\"\n// Action: plans.Update\n// Issue location: Line 4278\n// Current: + root_block_device (known after apply)\n// Should be: ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n\n\\t\\t\"in-place update - unknown block\": {\n\\t\\t\\tAction: plans.Update,\n\\t\\t\\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\\t\\t\\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"disks\": cty.SetVal([]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"mount_point\": cty.StringVal(\"/var/diska\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"size\":        cty.StringVal(\"50GB\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"root_block_device\": cty.SetVal([]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"volume_type\": cty.StringVal(\"gp1\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"new_field\":   cty.StringVal(\"new_value\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"volume_type\": cty.StringVal(\"gp2\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"new_field\":   cty.StringVal(\"new_value\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"id\": cty.SetVal([]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"mount_point\": cty.StringVal(\"/var/diska\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"size\":        cty.StringVal(\"50GB\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Set(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"new_field\":   cty.String,\n\\t\\t\\t\\t}))),\n\\t\\t\\t}),\n\\t\\t\\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\\t\\t\\tSchema: null\n          - volume_type = \"gp2\" -> null\n        }\n    }`,\n\\t\\t},\n\n---\n\n// TEST 3: TestResourceChange_nestedMap - Line 4763-4817\n// Function starts at line 4352\n// Test case name: \"in-place update - unknown block\"\n// Action: plans.Update\n// Issue location: Line 4808\n// Current: + root_block_device (known after apply)\n// Should be: ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n\n\\t\\t\"in-place update - unknown block\": {\n\\t\\t\\tAction: plans.Update,\n\\t\\t\\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\\t\\t\\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\"disks\": cty.MapVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"diska\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"mount_point\": cty.StringVal(\"/var/diska\"),\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\"size\": \"ami-AFTER\"\n        id    = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)  // LINE 4808 - NEEDS CHANGE TO ~\n      - root_block_device \"gp1\" {\n          - new_field   = \"new_value\" -> null\n          - volume_type = \"gp1\" -> null\n        }\n      - root_block_device \"gp2\" {\n          - new_field   =
