94. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "================================================================================\nCHANGES REQUIRED FOR plan_test.go (github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef)\n================================================================================\n\nTOTAL CHANGES NEEDED: 3\n\n================================================================================\nCHANGE 1: TestResourceChange_nestedList function\n================================================================================\nFile: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\nTest Case Name: \"in-place update - unknown block\"\nLine Number: 3551\nFunction Start: Line 2980 (func TestResourceChange_nestedList(t *testing.T))\n\nCURRENT CODE:\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n\nNEW CODE:\n      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n\nREASON: This is an Update action (line 3507: Action: plans.Update), not a Create.\nWhen a block transitions from known to unknown in an update context, it should show\nas modified (~) not created (+).\n\n================================================================================\nCHANGE 2: TestResourceChange_nestedSet function\n================================================================================\nFile: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\nTest Case Name: \"in-place update - unknown block\"\nLine Number: 4278\nFunction Start: Line 3697 (func TestResourceChange_nestedSet(t *testing.T))\n\nCURRENT CODE:\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n\nNEW CODE:\n      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n\nREASON: Same as Change 1 - this is also an Update action (line 4234: Action: plans.Update)\nwith unknown blocks that should be shown as modified (~) not created (+).\n\n================================================================================\nCHANGE 3: TestResourceChange_nestedMap function\n================================================================================\nFile: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\nTest Case Name: \"in-place update - unknown block\"\nLine Number: 4808\nFunction Start: Line 4352 (func TestResourceChange_nestedMap(t *testing.T))\n\nCURRENT CODE:\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n\nNEW CODE:\n      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n\nREASON: Consistent with Changes 1 and 2 - this is also an Update action\n(line 4764: Action: plans.Update) with unknown blocks that should be shown\nas modified (~) not created (+).\n\n================================================================================\nCONTEXT AND TECHNICAL DETAILS\n================================================================================\n\nPattern Recognition:\nAll three test cases follow the same pattern:\n1. Action is \"plans.Update\"\n2. Resource exists before (Before: has values)\n3. Block becomes unknown after (After: cty.UnknownVal)\n4. This represents a modification, not a creation\n\nExample pattern for all three:\n- Before: root_block_device: cty.[List|Set|Map]Val([]cty.Value{...with values...})\n- After:  root_block_device: cty.UnknownVal(cty.[List|Set|Map](...))\n- Action: plans.Update\n- Expected: ~ (modified) not + (created)\n\nThe issue is that when a block's value becomes unknown during an update operation,\nthe rendering currently shows it as a new block creation (+) rather than as a block\nmodification (~). This is semantically incorrect for Update actions.\n\n================================================================================\nRELATED CORRECT CASES (Do NOT change these - they are correct)\n================================================================================\n\nFor reference, there are related test cases that show the CREATE action pattern,\nwhich correctly use \"+\":\n\n1. Line 3503 - \"in-place create - unknown block\" (NestingList)\n   - Action: plans.Create \u2713 Correctly uses \"+\"\n\n2. Line 4230 - \"in-place create - unknown block\" (NestingSet)\n   - Action: plans.Create \u2713 Correctly uses \"+\"\n\n3. Line 4760 - \"in-place create - unknown block\" (NestingMap)\n   - Action: plans.Create \u2713 Correctly uses \"+\"\n\nThese CREATE cases should remain unchanged.\n\n================================================================================\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt"

Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192Terraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\n    42\u2192and found no differences, so no changes are needed.\n    43\u2192`\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n    46\u2192\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n    47\u2192\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n    48\u2192\t}\n    49\u2192}\n    50\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

99. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "# Analysis Report: Unknown Blocks with Update Actions\n\n## Repository Information\n- **Repository**: github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef\n- **File**: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\n- **Total Lines**: 8,168\n- **File Status**: Successfully downloaded to /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\n\n---\n\n## Executive Summary\n\nFound **3 test cases** where unknown blocks in UPDATE actions incorrectly display with `+` (create) symbol instead of `~` (modify) symbol. All three follow the same pattern across different block nesting types (List, Set, Map).\n\n---\n\n## Detailed Findings\n\n### Test Case 1: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (NestingList)\n\n**Location**:\n- Function: `TestResourceChange_nestedList(t *testing.T)` (starts at line 2980)\n- Test case: Lines 3506-3561\n- **Issue Line**: 3551\n\n**Change Required**:\n```diff\n- + root_block_device (known after apply)\n+ ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n```\n\n**Test Configuration**:\n- Action Type: `plans.Update` (line 3507)\n- Block Type: NestingList with cty.UnknownVal\n- Before State: root_block_device has 2 ListVal elements with gp1 and gp2 volume_types\n- After State: root_block_device becomes cty.UnknownVal\n- Context: In-place update where block becomes unknown\n\n---\n\n### Test Case 2: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (NestingSet)\n\n**Location**:\n- Function: `TestResourceChange_nestedSet(t *testing.T)` (starts at line 3697)\n- Test case: Lines 4233-4287\n- **Issue Line**: 4278\n\n**Change Required**:\n```diff\n- + root_block_device (known after apply)\n+ ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n```\n\n**Test Configuration**:\n- Action Type: `plans.Update` (line 4234)\n- Block Type: NestingSet with cty.UnknownVal\n- Before State: root_block_device has 2 SetVal elements\n- After State: root_block_device becomes cty.UnknownVal\n- Context: In-place update where block becomes unknown\n\n---\n\n### Test Case 3: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (NestingMap)\n\n**Location**:\n- Function: `TestResourceChange_nestedMap(t *testing.T)` (starts at line 4352)\n- Test case: Lines 4763-4817\n- **Issue Line**: 4808\n\n**Change Required**:\n```diff\n- + root_block_device (known after apply)\n+ ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n```\n\n**Test Configuration**:\n- Action Type: `plans.Update` (line 4764)\n- Block Type: NestingMap with cty.UnknownVal\n- Before State: root_block_device has 2 MapVal entries (gp1, gp2)\n- After State: root_block_device becomes cty.UnknownVal\n- Context: In-place update where block becomes unknown\n\n---\n\n## Pattern Analysis\n\nAll three test cases exhibit the same logical issue:\n\n1. **Before**: Resource exists with known block values\n   ```\n   cty.[List|Set|Map]Val([]cty.Value{...known values...})\n   ```\n\n2. **After**: Block becomes unknown (e.g., due to dependencies or dynamic values)\n   ```\n   cty.UnknownVal(cty.[List|Set|Map](...))\n   ```\n\n3. **Action**: Resource is being updated (`plans.Update`)\n\n4. **Current Behavior**: Shows as `+ (known after apply)` - indicating creation\n5. **Expected Behavior**: Should show as `~ (known after apply)` - indicating modification\n\n### Why This Matters\n\nThe symbol choice in Terraform output indicates the nature of the change:\n- `+` = Resource or block is being **created**\n- `~` = Resource or block is being **modified**\n- `-` = Resource or block is being **deleted**\n\nWhen a block transitions from known to unknown in an UPDATE action, it represents a modification of an existing block, not the creation of a new one. The current test expectations are semantically incorrect.\n\n---\n\n## Related (Correct) Test Cases\n\nThere are corresponding CREATE action test cases that correctly use `+`:\n\n| Location | Test Name | Line | Action | Status |\n|----------|-----------|------|--------|--------|\n| TestResourceChange_nestedList | \"in-place create - unknown block\" | 3503 | Create | \u2713 Correct |\n| TestResourceChange_nestedSet | \"in-place create - unknown block\" | 4230 | Create | \u2713 Correct |\n| TestResourceChange_nestedMap | \"in-place create - unknown block\" | 4760 | Create | \u2713 Correct |\n\nThese test cases are correct because they use `plans.Create` action and should display `+`.\n\n---\n\n## Summary Table\n\n| # | Test Function | Test Case | Line | Current | Should Be | Nesting Type |\n|---|---------------|-----------|------|---------|-----------|--------------|\n| 1 | TestResourceChange_nestedList | \"in-place update - unknown block\" | 3551 | `+` | `~` | List |\n| 2 | TestResourceChange_nestedSet | \"in-place update - unknown block\" | 4278 | `+` | `~` | Set |\n| 3 | TestResourceChange_nestedMap | \"in-place update - unknown block\" | 4808 | `+` | `~` | Map |\n\n---\n\n## Deliverables Provided\n\n1. **FINDINGS.md** - Detailed analysis with test case information\n2. **CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt** - Step-by-step change instructions\n3. **test_extracts.go** - Code extracts showing the affected test cases\n4. **plan_test.go** - Complete test file saved locally at `/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go`\n5. **ANALYSIS_REPORT.md** - This comprehensive report\n\n---\n\n## Verification Status\n\n- \u2713 All three test cases identified and verified\n- \u2713 Line numbers confirmed for each occurrence\n- \u2713 Action types verified (all are `plans.Update`)\n- \u2713 Block types confirmed (List, Set, Map nesting)\n- \u2713 Expected behavior identified\n- \u2713 File successfully downloaded and saved locally\n\n---\n\n## Recommendations\n\n1. Update the three test cases to use `~` instead of `+` for unknown blocks in Update actions\n2. Ensure consistency with the semantic meaning of the symbols\n3. Verify that the actual rendering code produces the correct output with these test expectations\n4. Consider adding comments in the test cases explaining why `~` is used for updates to unknown blocks\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/ANALYSIS_REPORT.md"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/ANALYSIS_REPORT.md"
100. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "================================================================================\nQUICK REFERENCE: Unknown Blocks Update Actions in plan_test.go\n================================================================================\n\nANSWER TO YOUR QUESTIONS:\n\n1) HOW MANY LOCATIONS WERE FOUND?\n   Answer: 3 (three) locations\n\n2) WHAT ARE THE TEST NAMES?\n   Answer:\n   - Test 1: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (in TestResourceChange_nestedList)\n   - Test 2: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (in TestResourceChange_nestedSet)\n   - Test 3: \"in-place update - unknown block\" (in TestResourceChange_nestedMap)\n\n3) APPROXIMATE LINE NUMBERS WHERE CHANGES NEEDED?\n   Answer:\n   - Location 1: Line 3551 (TestResourceChange_nestedList, function starts at line 2980)\n   - Location 2: Line 4278 (TestResourceChange_nestedSet, function starts at line 3697)\n   - Location 3: Line 4808 (TestResourceChange_nestedMap, function starts at line 4352)\n\n================================================================================\nWHAT NEEDS TO CHANGE:\n================================================================================\n\nAll three locations need the SAME type of change:\n\nFROM:  + root_block_device (known after apply)\nTO:    ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n\nSimply change the '+' symbol to '~' on all three lines.\n\n================================================================================\nWHY:\n================================================================================\n\nThese test cases have:\n- Action: plans.Update (not Create)\n- Block Transition: known values \u2192 unknown values\n- Semantic Meaning: Block is being MODIFIED (~), not CREATED (+)\n\nCurrently the tests incorrectly expect \"+\" which indicates creation.\nSince these are UPDATE actions, they should show \"~\" which indicates modification.\n\n================================================================================\nFILE LOCATION:\n================================================================================\n\nFull path: /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go\nTotal size: 8,168 lines\nSuccessfully downloaded and saved locally\n\n================================================================================\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/QUICK_REFERENCE.txt"
}
Output
"File created successfully at: /workspace/QUICK_REFERENCE.txt"

105. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /workspace/README.md << 'EOF'\n# Analysis of Unknown Blocks in Update Actions - plan_test.go\n\nThis directory contains the analysis results for identifying and documenting test cases in the Terraform repository that involve unknown blocks within Update actions.\n\n## Files Generated\n\n1. **QUICK_REFERENCE.txt** - Start here! Quick answers to the three questions asked\n2. **FINDINGS.md** - Detailed analysis with full context and technical explanation\n3. **CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt** - Precise line-by-line changes that need to be made\n4. **ANALYSIS_REPORT.md** - Comprehensive report with all findings and recommendations\n5. **test_extracts.go** - Code excerpts showing the affected test cases\n6. **internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go** - Complete test file (8,168 lines)\n\n## Summary of Findings\n\n### Question 1: How many locations?\n**Answer: 3 locations**\n\n### Question 2: What are the test names?\n**Answers:**\n- \"in-place update - unknown block\" in TestResourceChange_nestedList\n- \"in-place update - unknown block\" in TestResourceChange_nestedSet  \n- \"in-place update - unknown block\" in TestResourceChange_nestedMap\n\n### Question 3: Approximate line numbers?\n**Answers:**\n- Line 3551 (TestResourceChange_nestedList, function at line 2980)\n- Line 4278 (TestResourceChange_nestedSet, function at line 3697)\n- Line 4808 (TestResourceChange_nestedMap, function at line 4352)\n\n## What Needs to Be Fixed\n\nAll three test cases need the same type of change:\n\n```\nChange: + to ~ for \"root_block_device (known after apply)\"\n```\n\n**Reason**: These are UPDATE actions where a block transitions from known to unknown values. The semantic meaning should be \"modified (~)\" not \"created (+)\".\n\n## Verification\n\nAll findings have been verified:\n- \u2713 Located in github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef\n- \u2713 Line numbers confirmed\n- \u2713 All three are within Update actions\n- \u2713 All three involve blocks becoming unknown\n- \u2713 File successfully downloaded to local workspace\n\n## Next Steps\n\n1. Review the QUICK_REFERENCE.txt for quick answers\n2. Review FINDINGS.md for detailed technical context\n3. Apply the changes listed in CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt\n4. Verify with the test_extracts.go code samples\nEOF\ncat /workspace/README.md\n"
}
Output
"# Analysis of Unknown Blocks in Update Actions - plan_test.go\n\nThis directory contains the analysis results for identifying and documenting test cases in the Terraform repository that involve unknown blocks within Update actions.\n\n## Files Generated\n\n1. **QUICK_REFERENCE.txt** - Start here! Quick answers to the three questions asked\n2. **FINDINGS.md** - Detailed analysis with full context and technical explanation\n3. **CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt** - Precise line-by-line changes that need to be made\n4. **ANALYSIS_REPORT.md** - Comprehensive report with all findings and recommendations\n5. **test_extracts.go** - Code excerpts showing the affected test cases\n6. **internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go** - Complete test file (8,168 lines)\n\n## Summary of Findings\n\n### Question 1: How many locations?\n**Answer: 3 locations**\n\n### Question 2: What are the test names?\n**Answers:**\n- \"in-place update - unknown block\" in TestResourceChange_nestedList\n- \"in-place update - unknown block\" in TestResourceChange_nestedSet  \n- \"in-place update - unknown block\" in TestResourceChange_nestedMap\n\n### Question 3: Approximate line numbers?\n**Answers:**\n- Line 3551 (TestResourceChange_nestedList, function at line 2980)\n- Line 4278 (TestResourceChange_nestedSet, function at line 3697)\n- Line 4808 (TestResourceChange_nestedMap, function at line 4352)\n\n## What Needs to Be Fixed\n\nAll three test cases need the same type of change:\n\n```\nChange: + to ~ for \"root_block_device (known after apply)\"\n```\n\n**Reason**: These are UPDATE actions where a block transitions from known to unknown values. The semantic meaning should be \"modified (~)\" not \"created (+)\".\n\n## Verification\n\nAll findings have been verified:\n- \u2713 Located in github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef\n- \u2713 Line numbers confirmed\n- \u2713 All three are within Update actions\n- \u2713 All three involve blocks becoming unknown\n- \u2713 File successfully downloaded to local workspace\n\n## Next Steps\n\n1. Review the QUICK_REFERENCE.txt for quick answers\n2. Review FINDINGS.md for detailed technical context\n3. Apply the changes listed in CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt\n4. Verify with the test_extracts.go code samples"

  "file": {
    "content": "\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami   = \"ami-BEFORE\" -> \"ami-AFTER\"\n        id    = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n      - root_block_device {\n          - new_field   = \"new_value\" -> null\n          - volume_type = \"gp1\" -> null\n        }\n      - root_block_device {\n          - new_field   = \"new_value\" -> null\n          - volume_type = \"gp2\" -> null\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"in-place update - unknown block with replace\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.CreateThenDelete,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,",

    "startLine": 3545,

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go",
  "newString": "      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n      - root_block_device {",
  "oldString": "      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n      - root_block_device {",
  "originalFile": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage jsonformat\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\t\"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring\"\n\t\"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/addrs\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/differ\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/structured\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/structured/attribute_path\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonplan\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonprovider\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/configs/configschema\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/providers\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/states\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/terminal\"\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/terraform\"\n)\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_EmptyPlan(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\tplan := Plan{}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}\n\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\twant := `\nNo changes. Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\n\nTerraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\nand found no differences, so no changes are needed.\n`\n\n\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_DeferredPlan(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\tplan := Plan{\n\t\tDeferredChanges: []jsonplan.DeferredResourceChange{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tReason: jsonplan.DeferredReasonDeferredPrereq,\n\t\t\t\tResourceChange: jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"aws_instance.foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"aws_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tIndexUnknown: true,\n\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"aws\",\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"update\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tProviderSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Provider{\n\t\t\t\"aws\": {\n\t\t\t\tResourceSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"aws_instance\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: &jsonprovider.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*jsonprovider.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}\n\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\twant := `\nNo current changes. This plan requires another plan to be applied first.\n\n\nNote: This is a partial plan, parts can only be known in the next plan / apply cycle.\n\n\n  # aws_instance.foo was deferred\n  # (because a prerequisite for this resource is deferred)\n  ~ resource \"aws_instance\" \"foo\" {\n        id = \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\"\n    }\n\n\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n`\n\n\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_EmptyOutputs(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\toutputVal, _ := json.Marshal(\"some-text\")\n\tplan := Plan{\n\t\tOutputChanges: map[string]jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\"a_string\": {\n\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"no-op\"},\n\t\t\t\tBefore:  outputVal,\n\t\t\t\tAfter:   outputVal,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color, Streams: streams}\n\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\twant := `\nNo changes. Your infrastructure matches the configuration.\n\nTerraform has compared your real infrastructure against your configuration\nand found no differences, so no changes are needed.\n`\n\n\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestRenderHuman_Imports(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tschemas := map[string]*jsonprovider.Provider{\n\t\t\"test\": {\n\t\t\tResourceSchemas: map[string]*jsonprovider.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\"test_resource\": {\n\t\t\t\t\tBlock: &jsonprovider.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*jsonprovider.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributeType: marshalJson(t, \"string\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\ttcs := map[string]struct {\n\t\tplan   Plan\n\t\toutput string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"simple_import\": {\n\t\t\tplan: Plan{\n\t\t\t\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"test_resource.resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"test_resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"test\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"no-op\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID: \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `\nTerraform will perform the following actions:\n\n  # test_resource.resource will be imported\n    resource \"test_resource\" \"resource\" {\n        id    = \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\"\n        value = \"Hello, World!\"\n    }\n\nPlan: 1 to import, 0 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"simple_import_with_generated_config\": {\n\t\t\tplan: Plan{\n\t\t\t\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"test_resource.resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"test_resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"test\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"no-op\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID: \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tGeneratedConfig: `resource \"test_resource\" \"resource\" {\n  id = []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddress:         \"test_resource.after\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPreviousAddress: \"test_resource.before\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: test_resource.before has moved to test_resource.after\n  # (imported from \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\")\n    resource \"test_resource\" \"after\" {\n        id    = \"test_resource.before\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode:            \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType:            \"test_resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:            \"after\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `\nTerraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution\nplan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\n  ~ update in-place\n\nTerraform will perform the following actions:\n\n  # test_resource.after will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_resource.before)\n  # (imported from \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\")\n  ~ resource \"test_resource\" \"after\" {\n        id    = \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\"\n      ~ value = \"Hello, World!\" -> \"Hello, Universe!\"\n    }\n\nPlan: 1 to import, 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"import_and_update\": {\n\t\t\tplan: Plan{\n\t\t\t\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"test_resource.resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"test_resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"test\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"update\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, Universe!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID: \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `\nTerraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution\nplan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\n  ~ update in-place\n\nTerraform will perform the following actions:\n\n  # test_resource.resource will be updated in-place\n  # (imported from \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\")\n  ~ resource \"test_resource\" \"resource\" {\n        id    = \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\"\n      ~ value = \"Hello, World!\" -> \"Hello, Universe!\"\n    }\n\nPlan: 1 to import, 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"import_and_update_with_no_id\": {\n\t\t\tplan: Plan{\n\t\t\t\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"test_resource.resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"test_resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"test\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"update\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, Universe!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `\nTerraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution\nplan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\n  ~ update in-place\n\nTerraform will perform the following actions:\n\n  # test_resource.resource will be updated in-place\n  # (will be imported first)\n  ~ resource \"test_resource\" \"resource\" {\n        id    = \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\"\n      ~ value = \"Hello, World!\" -> \"Hello, Universe!\"\n    }\n\nPlan: 1 to import, 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"import_and_replace\": {\n\t\t\tplan: Plan{\n\t\t\t\tResourceChanges: []jsonplan.ResourceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddress:      \"test_resource.resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMode:         \"managed\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType:         \"test_resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"resource\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderName: \"test\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: jsonplan.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tActions: []string{\"create\", \"delete\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: marshalJson(t, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":    \"9794FB1F-7260-442F-830C-F2D450E90CE3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"value\": \"Hello, World!\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReplacePaths: marshalJson(t, [][]string{{\"id\"}}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tImporting: &jsonplan.Importing{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID: \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tActionReason: \"\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `\nTerraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution\nplan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols:\n+/- create replacement and then destroy\n\nTerraform will perform the following actions:\n\n  # test_resource.resource must be replaced\n  # (imported from \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\")\n  # Warning: this will destroy the imported resource\n+/- resource \"test_resource\" \"resource\" {\n      ~ id    = \"1D5F5E9E-F2E5-401B-9ED5-692A215AC67E\" -> \"9794FB1F-7260-442F-830C-F2D450E90CE3\" # forces replacement\n        value = \"Hello, World!\"\n    }\n\nPlan: 1 to import, 1 to add, 0 to change, 1 to destroy.\n`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor name, tc := range tcs {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tstreams, done := terminal.StreamsForTesting(t)\n\n\t\t\tplan := tc.plan\n\t\t\tplan.PlanFormatVersion = jsonplan.FormatVersion\n\t\t\tplan.ProviderFormatVersion = jsonprovider.FormatVersion\n\t\t\tplan.ProviderSchemas = schemas\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{\n\t\t\t\tColorize: color,\n\t\t\t\tStreams:  streams,\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tplan.renderHuman(renderer, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\tgot := done(t).Stdout()\n\t\t\twant := tc.output\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(want, got); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", got, want, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_primitiveTypes(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"creation\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be created\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      + id = (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"creation (null string)\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"string\": cty.StringVal(\"null\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be created\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      + string = \"null\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"creation (null string with extra whitespace)\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"string\": cty.StringVal(\"null \"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"string\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be created\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      + string = \"null \"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"creation (object with quoted keys)\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"object\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"unquoted\":   cty.StringVal(\"value\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"quoted:key\": cty.StringVal(\"some-value\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"object\": {Type: cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"unquoted\":   cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"quoted:key\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t}), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be created\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      + object = {\n          + \"quoted:key\" = \"some-value\"\n          + unquoted     = \"value\"\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"deletion\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Delete,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be destroyed\n  - resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      - id = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> null\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"deletion of deposed object\": {\n\t\t\tAction:     plans.Delete,\n\t\t\tMode:       addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tDeposedKey: states.DeposedKey(\"byebye\"),\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example (deposed object byebye) will be destroyed\n  # (left over from a partially-failed replacement of this instance)\n  - resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      - id = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> null\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"deletion (empty string)\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Delete,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":                 cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"intentionally_long\": cty.StringVal(\"\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":                 {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"intentionally_long\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be destroyed\n  - resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      - id                 = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> null\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"forget\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Forget,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-123\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: ` # test_instance.example will no longer be managed by Terraform, but will not be destroyed\n # (destroy = false is set in the configuration)\n . resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"forget (deposed)\": {\n\t\t\tAction:     plans.Forget,\n\t\t\tMode:       addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tDeposedKey: states.DeposedKey(\"adios\"),\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: ` # test_instance.example (deposed object adios) will be removed from Terraform state, but will not be destroyed\n # (left over from a partially-failed replacement of this instance)\n # (destroy = false is set in the configuration)\n . resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"create-then-forget\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.CreateThenForget,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02999999999999999\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"ami\"},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: ` # test_instance.example must be replaced, but the existing object will not be destroyed\n # (destroy = false is set in the configuration)\n +/. resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = \"ami-BEFORE\" -> \"ami-AFTER\" # forces replacement\n      ~ id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> \"i-02999999999999999\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"string in-place update\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":       cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"saml:aud\": &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":       {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"saml:aud\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"zeta\":     {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be plans.ResourceInstanceReplaceBecauseCannotUpdate,\n\t\t\tMode:         addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"unchanged\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"empty\":     {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"obj\": {NestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSingle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"from_null\": {Type: cty.DynamicPseudoType, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"to_null\":   {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n      ~ obj = {\n          + from_null = \"\"\n          - to_null   = \"\" -> null\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"in-place update of multi-line string field\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": cty.StringVal(`original\nlong\nmulti-line\nstring\nfield`),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": cty.StringVal(`original\nextremely long\nmulti-line\nstring\nfield`),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":         {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ id         = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> (known after apply)\n      ~ more_lines = <<-EOT\n            original\n          - long\n          + extremely long\n            multi-line\n            string\n            field\n        EOT\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"addition of multi-line string field\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":         cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": cty.NullVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": cty.StringVal(`original\nnew line`),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":         {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ id         = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> (known after apply)\n      + more_lines = <<-EOT\n            original\n            new line\n        EOT\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"force-new update of multi-line string field\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":         cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": cty.StringVal(`original`),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": cty.StringVal(`original\nnew line`),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":         {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"more_lines\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"more_lines\"},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ id         = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> (known after apply)\n      ~ more_lines = <<-EOT # forces replacement\n            original\n          + new line\n        EOT\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t// Sensitive\n\n\t\t\"creation with sensitive field\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":       cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":       {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSingle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be created\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      + conn_info = {\n          + password = (sensitive value)\n          + user     = \"not-secret\"\n        }\n      + id        = (known after apply)\n      + password  = (sensitive value)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with equal sensitive field\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":       cty.StringVal(\"blah\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"str\":      cty.StringVal(\"before\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":       cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\"str\":      cty.StringVal(\"after\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":       {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"str\":      {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ id       = \"blah\" -> (known after apply)\n      ~ str      = \"before\" -> \"after\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t// tainted objects\n\t\t\"replace tainted resource\": {\n\t\t\tAction:       plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tActionReason: plans.ResourceInstanceReplaceBecauseTainted,\n\t\t\tMode:         addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"ami\"},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example is tainted, so must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = \"ami-BEFORE\" -> \"ami-AFTER\" # forces replacement\n      ~ id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"force replacement with empty before value\": {\n\t\t\tAction:       plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tActionReason: plans.ResourceInstanceReplaceBecauseCannotUpdate,\n\t\t\tMode:         addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"name\":   cty.StringVal(\"name\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"forced\": cty.NullVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"name\":   cty.StringVal(\"name\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"forced\": cty.StringVal(\"example\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"name\":   {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"forced\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"forced\"},\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      + forced = \"example\" # forces replacement\n        name   = \"name\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"force replacement with empty before value legacy\": {\n\t\t\tAction:       plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tActionReason: plans.ResourceInstanceReplaceBecauseCannotUpdate,\n\t\t\tMode:         addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"name\":   cty.StringVal(\"name\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"forced\": cty.StringVal(\"\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter:
