The value is unchanged.\n          ~ \"dinner\"    = (sensitive value)\n            # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        }\n      # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n      ~ map_whole   = (sensitive value)\n      # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n      ~ some_number = (sensitive value)\n      # Warning: this attribute value will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change. The value is unchanged.\n      ~ special     = (sensitive value)\n\n      # Warning: this block will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change.\n      ~ nested_block {\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n\n      # Warning: this block will no longer be marked as sensitive\n      # after applying this change.\n      ~ nested_block_set {\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"deletion\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.Delete,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSet,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive value forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": {Type: cty.String, Required: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSet,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"nested_block_set\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = (sensitive value) # forces replacement\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n\n      - nested_block_set { # forces replacement\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n      + nested_block_set { # forces replacement\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive attribute forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = (sensitive value) # forces replacement\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive nested type attribute forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"new-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSingle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"conn_info\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"password\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ conn_info = { # forces replacement\n          ~ password = (sensitive value)\n            # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n        }\n        id        = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_moved(t *testing.T) {\n\tprevRunAddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and updated\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"boop\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_instance.previous)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ bar = \"baz\" -> \"boop\"\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"moved without changes\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\t\tDeposedKey:  tc.DeposedKey,\n\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  + foo = \"bar\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"removed output\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  - foo = \"bar\" -> null`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"single string change\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = \"bar\" -> \"baz\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"element added to list\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"gamma\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"a\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(1),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(2),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"b\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hunter2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"correct-horse-battery-staple\"),\n\t\t\t\t\ttrue,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"c\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(false),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(true),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := &plans.ChangesSrc{\n\t\t\t\tOutputs: tc.changes,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\toutputs, err := jsonplan.MarshalOutputChanges(changes)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal output changes\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tOutputChanges: outputs,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\toutput := renderHumanDiffOutputs(renderer, diffs.outputs)\n\t\t\tif output != tc.output {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected diff.\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\n\", output, tc.output)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_deferredActions(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tproviderAddr := addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t}\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"deferred create action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonAbsentPrereq,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because a prerequisite for this resource has not yet been created)\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      + ami  = \"bar\"\n      + disk = (known after apply)\n      + id   = (known after apply)\n\n      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred create action unknown for_each\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonInstanceCountUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.WildcardKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance[*] was deferred\n  # (because the number of resource instances is unknown)\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      + ami  = \"bar\"\n      + disk = (known after apply)\n      + id   = (known after apply)\n\n      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred update action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonProviderConfigUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because the provider configuration is unknown)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      ~ ami = \"bar\" -> \"baz\"\n        id  = \"foo\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred destroy action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonResourceConfigUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because the resource configuration is unknown)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      - ami = \"bar\" -> null\n      - id  = \"foo\" -> null\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tblockSchema := testSchema(configschema.NestingSingle)\n\t\t\tfullSchema := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tproviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"test_instance\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: blockSchema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvar changes []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChangeSrc\n\t\t\tfor _, change := range tc.changes {\n\t\t\t\tchangeSrc, err := change.Encode(blockSchema.ImpliedType())\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to encode change: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tchanges = append(changes, changeSrc)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdeferredChanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalDeferredResourceChanges(changes, fullSchema)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal deferred changes: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(fullSchema)\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tDeferredChanges: deferredChanges,\n\t\t\t\tProviderSchemas: jsonschemas,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\t// TODO: Add diffing for outputs\n\t\t\t// TODO: Make sure it's true and either make it a single entity in the test case or deal with a list here\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDeferredDiff(renderer, diffs.deferred[0])\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(tc.output, output); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", output, tc.output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc outputChange(name string, before, after cty.Value, sensitive bool) *plans.OutputChangeSrc {\n\taddr := addrs.AbsOutputValue{\n\t\tOutputValue: addrs.OutputValue{Name: name},\n\t}\n\n\tchange := &plans.OutputChange{\n\t\tAddr: addr, Change: plans.Change{\n\t\t\tBefore: before,\n\t\t\tAfter:  after,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSensitive: sensitive,\n\t}\n\n\tchangeSrc, err := change.Encode()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to encode change for %s: %s\", addr, err))\n\t}\n\n\treturn changeSrc\n}\n\n// A basic test schema using a configurable NestingMode for one (NestedType) attribute and one block\nfunc testSchema(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\tvar diskKey = \"disks\"\n\tif nesting == configschema.NestingSingle {\n\t\tdiskKey = \"disk\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\tdiskKey: {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// A basic test schema using a configurable NestingMode for one (NestedType)\n// attribute marked sensitive.\nfunc testSchemaSensitive(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\"disks\": {\n\t\t\t\tSensitive: true,\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc testSchemaMultipleBlocks(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\"disks\": {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\"leaf_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// similar to testSchema with the addition of a \"new_field\" block\nfunc testSchemaPlus(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\tvar diskKey = \"disks\"\n\tif nesting == configschema.NestingSingle {\n\t\tdiskKey = \"disk\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\tdiskKey: {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"new_field\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc marshalJson(t *testing.T, data interface{}) json.RawMessage {\n\tresult, err := json.Marshal(data)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal json: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\treturn result\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "     \"in-place create - unknown block\": {",

        "       Mode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,",

1. WRITE /workspace/unknown.go
// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1

package renderers

import (
	"fmt"

	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed"

	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
)

var _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)

func Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {
	return &unknownRenderer{
		before: before,
	}
}

type unknownRenderer struct {
	NoWarningsRenderer

	before computed.Diff
}

func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
	if diff.Action == plans.Create {
		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
	}

	// If the before renderer is nil, treat it the same as a Create action.
	if renderer.before.Renderer == nil {
		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
	}

	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
	if diff.Replace {
		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
	}
	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
}

2. WRITE /workspace/block.go
// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1

package renderers

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"
	"sort"

	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed"

	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
)

var (
	_ computed.DiffRenderer = (*blockRenderer)(nil)

	importantAttributes = []string{
		"id",
		"name",
		"tags",
	}
)

func importantAttribute(attr string) bool {
	for _, attribute := range importantAttributes {
		if attribute == attr {
			return true
		}
	}
	return false
}

func Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {
	return &blockRenderer{
		attributes: attributes,
		blocks:     blocks,
	}
}

type blockRenderer struct {
	NoWarningsRenderer

	attributes map[string]computed.Diff
	blocks     Blocks
}

func (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
	if len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {
		return fmt.Sprintf("{}%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
	}

	unchangedAttributes := 0
	unchangedBlocks := 0

	maximumAttributeKeyLen := 0
	var attributeKeys []string
	escapedAttributeKeys := make(map[string]string)
	for key := range renderer.attributes {
		attributeKeys = append(attributeKeys, key)
		escapedKey := EnsureValidAttributeName(key)
		escapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey
		if maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {
			maximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)
		}
	}
	sort.Strings(attributeKeys)

	importantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()
	importantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true

	attributeOpts := opts.Clone()

	var buf bytes.Buffer
	buf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("{%s\n", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))
	for _, key := range attributeKeys {
		attribute := r
... (truncated)

// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1

package renderers

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"strings"
	"testing"

	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed"

	"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp"
	"github.com/mitchellh/colorstring"
	"github.com/zclconf/go-cty/cty"

	"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans"
)

func TestRenderers_Human(t *testing.T) {
	colorize := colorstring.Colorize{
		Colors:  colorstring.DefaultColors,
		Disable: true,
	}

	tcs := map[string]struct {
		diff     computed.Diff
		expected string
		opts     computed.RenderHumanOpts
	}{
		// We're using the string "null" in these tests to demonstrate the
		// difference between rendering an actual string and rendering a null
		// value.
		"primitive_create_string": {
			diff: computed.Diff{
				Renderer: Primitive(nil, "null", cty.String),
				Action:   plans.Create,
			},
			expected: "\"null\"",
		},
		"primitive_delete_string": {
			diff: computed.Diff{
				Renderer: Primitive("null", nil, cty.String),
				Action:   plans.Delete,
			},
			expected: "\"null\" -> null",
		},
		"primitive_update_string_to_null": {
			diff: computed.Diff{
				Renderer: Primitive("null", nil, cty.String),
				Action:   plans.Update,
			},
			expected: "\"null\" -> null",
		},
		"primitive_update_string_from_null": {
			diff: computed.Diff{
				Renderer: Primitive(nil, "null", cty.String),
				Action:   plans.Update,
			},
			expected: "null -> \"null\"",
		},
		"primitive_update_multiline_string_to_null": {
			diff: computed.Diff{
				Renderer: Primitive("nu\nll", nil, cty.String),
				Action:   plans.Update,
			},
			expected: `
<<-EOT
      - nu
      - ll
      + null
    EOT
`,
		},
		"primitive_update_multiline_string_from_null": {
			diff: computed.Diff{
				Rendere
... (truncated)

5. WRITE /workspace/FINDINGS.md
# Test Case Analysis: Unknown Blocks with Update Actions in plan_test.go

## Repository
github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef
File: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go

## Summary
Found **3 test cases** with Update/Create actions that have unknown blocks showing "+ (known after apply)" output. These need to be changed from `+` to `~` to indicate they are modified/updated blocks rather than new blocks being created.

---

## Test Cases Found

### 1. Test: "in-place update - unknown block" (TestResourceChange_nestedList)
- **Function**: `TestResourceChange_nestedList(t *testing.T)`
- **Line Range**: Lines 3506-3560 (test case definition) with expected output on line 3551
- **Action Type**: `plans.Update`
- **Block Type**: NestingList (cty.UnknownVal with List)
- **Current Expected Output (Line 3551)**:
  ```
  + root_block_device (known after apply)
  ```
- **Should Be Changed To**:
  ```
  ~ root_block_device (known after apply)
  ```
- **Context**: Test has before/after values where `root_block_device` goes from known (SetVal) to unknown (UnknownVal). This is an update context where the block is being modified, not created.

---

### 2. Test: "in-place update - unknown block" (TestResourceChange_nestedSet)
- **Function**: `TestResourceChange_nestedSet(t *testing.T)`
- **Line Range**: Lines 4233-4287 (test case definition) with expected output on line 4278
- **Action Type**: `plans.Update`
- **Block Type**: NestingSet (cty.UnknownVal with Set)
- **Current Expected Output (Line 4278)**:
  ```
  + root_block_device (known after apply)
  ```
- **Should Be Changed To**:
  ```
  ~ root_block_device (known after apply)
  ```
- **Context**: Similar to the List case - before has root_block_device with values, after becomes UnknownVal. This is an update operation.

---

##
... (truncated)

================================================================================
CHANGES REQUIRED FOR plan_test.go (github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef)
================================================================================

CHANGE 1: TestResourceChange_nestedList function
================================================================================
File: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
Test Case Name: "in-place update - unknown block"
Line Number: 3551
Function Start: Line 2980 (func TestResourceChange_nestedList(t *testing.T))

CURRENT CODE:
      + root_block_device (known after apply)

NEW CODE:
      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)

REASON: This is an Update action (line 3507: Action: plans.Update), not a Create.
When a block transitions from known to unknown in an update context, it should show
as modified (~) not created (+).

File: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
Test Case Name: "in-place update - unknown block"

NEW CODE:
      ~ root_block_device (known after apply)

with unknown blocks that should be shown as modified (~) not created (+).

8. WRITE /workspace/ANALYSIS_REPORT.md
# Analysis Report: Unknown Blocks with Update Actions

## Repository Information
- **Repository**: github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef
- **File**: internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
- **Total Lines**: 8,168
- **File Status**: Successfully downloaded to /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go

---

## Executive Summary

Found **3 test cases** where unknown blocks in UPDATE actions incorrectly display with `+` (create) symbol instead of `~` (modify) symbol. All three follow the same pattern across different block nesting types (List, Set, Map).

---

## Detailed Findings

### Test Case 1: "in-place update - unknown block" (NestingList)

**Location**:
- Function: `TestResourceChange_nestedList(t *testing.T)` (starts at line 2980)
- Test case: Lines 3506-3561
- **Issue Line**: 3551

**Change Required**:
```diff
- + root_block_device (known after apply)
+ ~ root_block_device (known after apply)
```

**Test Configuration**:
- Action Type: `plans.Update` (line 3507)
- Block Type: NestingList with cty.UnknownVal
- Before State: root_block_device has 2 ListVal elements with gp1 and gp2 volume_types
- After State: root_block_device becomes cty.UnknownVal
- Context: In-place update where block becomes unknown

---

### Test Case 2: "in-place update - unknown block" (NestingSet)

**Location**:
- Function: `TestResourceChange_nestedSet(t *testing.T)` (starts at line 3697)
- Test case: Lines 4233-4287
- **Issue Line**: 4278

**Change Required**:
```diff
- + root_block_device (known after apply)
+ ~ root_block_device (known after apply)
```

**Test Configuration**:
- Action Type: `plans.Update` (line 4234)
- Block Type: NestingSet with cty.UnknownVal
- Before State: root_block_device has 2 SetVal elements
- After State: root_block_device becomes cty.UnknownVal
- 
... (truncated)
9. WRITE /workspace/QUICK_REFERENCE.txt
================================================================================
QUICK REFERENCE: Unknown Blocks Update Actions in plan_test.go
================================================================================

ANSWER TO YOUR QUESTIONS:

1) HOW MANY LOCATIONS WERE FOUND?
   Answer: 3 (three) locations

2) WHAT ARE THE TEST NAMES?
   Answer:
   - Test 1: "in-place update - unknown block" (in TestResourceChange_nestedList)
   - Test 2: "in-place update - unknown block" (in TestResourceChange_nestedSet)
   - Test 3: "in-place update - unknown block" (in TestResourceChange_nestedMap)

3) APPROXIMATE LINE NUMBERS WHERE CHANGES NEEDED?
   Answer:
   - Location 1: Line 3551 (TestResourceChange_nestedList, function starts at line 2980)
   - Location 2: Line 4278 (TestResourceChange_nestedSet, function starts at line 3697)
   - Location 3: Line 4808 (TestResourceChange_nestedMap, function starts at line 4352)

================================================================================
WHAT NEEDS TO CHANGE:
================================================================================

All three locations need the SAME type of change:

FROM:  + root_block_device (known after apply)
TO:    ~ root_block_device (known after apply)

Simply change the '+' symbol to '~' on all three lines.

================================================================================
WHY:
================================================================================

These test cases have:
- Action: plans.Update (not Create)
- Block Transition: known values → unknown values
- Semantic Meaning: Block is being MODIFIED (~), not CREATED (+)

Currently the tests incorrectly expect "+" which indicates creation.
Since these are UPDATE actions, they should show "~" which indicates m
... (truncated)

15. $ cat > /workspace/README.md << 'EOF'
# Analysis of Unknown Blocks in Update Actions - plan_test.go

This directory contains the analysis results for identifying and documenting test cases in the Terraform repository that involve unknown blocks within Update actions.

## Files Generated

1. **QUICK_REFERENCE.txt** - Start here! Quick answers to the three questions asked
2. **FINDINGS.md** - Detailed analysis with full context and technical explanation
3. **CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt** - Precise line-by-line changes that need to be made
4. **ANALYSIS_REPORT.md** - Comprehensive report with all findings and recommendations
5. **test_extracts.go** - Code excerpts showing the affected test cases
6. **internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go** - Complete test file (8,168 lines)

## Summary of Findings

### Question 1: How many locations?
**Answer: 3 locations**

### Question 2: What are the test names?
**Answers:**
- "in-place update - unknown block" in TestResourceChange_nestedList
- "in-place update - unknown block" in TestResourceChange_nestedSet  
- "in-place update - unknown block" in TestResourceChange_nestedMap

### Question 3: Approximate line numbers?
**Answers:**
- Line 3551 (TestResourceChange_nestedList, function at line 2980)
- Line 4278 (TestResourceChange_nestedSet, function at line 3697)
- Line 4808 (TestResourceChange_nestedMap, function at line 4352)

## What Needs to Be Fixed

All three test cases need the same type of change:

```
Change: + to ~ for "root_block_device (known after apply)"
```

**Reason**: These are UPDATE actions where a block transitions from known to unknown values. The semantic meaning should be "modified (~)" not "created (+)".

## Verification

All findings have been verified:
- ✓ Located in github.com/sg-evals/terraform--abd6b9ef
- ✓ Line numbers confirmed
- ✓ All three are within Update actions
- ✓ All three involve blocks becoming unknown
- ✓ File successfully downloaded to local workspace

## Next Steps

1. Review the QUICK_REFERENCE.txt for quick answers
2. Review FINDINGS.md for detailed technical context
3. Apply the changes listed in CHANGES_REQUIRED.txt
4. Verify with the test_extracts.go code samples
EOF
cat /workspace/README.md

====================================
SUMMARY OF CHANGES
====================================

1. unknown.go (lines 33-36)
   ✓ Added nil check for renderer.before.Renderer
   ✓ Handles null-to-unknown transitions without nil pointer dereference

2. block.go (3 locations)
   ✓ Line 161: MapBlock - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   ✓ Line 173: SetBlock - changed plans.Create to diff.Action  
   ✓ Line 182: ListBlock - changed plans.Create to diff.Action
   ✓ Now passes actual diff action instead of hardcoded Create

3. renderer_test.go (lines 436-442)
   ✓ Added computed_update_from_null test case
   ✓ Tests Unknown(empty Diff) with plans.Update action
   ✓ Expected: "(known after apply)"

4. plan_test.go (6 locations)
   ✓ Line 3551: NestingList in-place update
   ✓ Line 3610: NestingList with replace
   ✓ Line 4278: NestingSet in-place update
   ✓ Line 4337: NestingSet with replace
   ✓ Line 4808: NestingMap in-place update
   ✓ Line 4867: NestingMap with replace
   ✓ Changed + to ~ for unknown blocks during updates

====================================
EOF
